subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! A letter has been written to the friends in Tāliqān which is enclosed; please deliver it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای باحبای طالقان مرقوم گردید در جوف است برسانید جناب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @apostles; early disciples of Christ
